Sector Representatives Discussed Future Changes and Transformations at META SUMMIT 2022

22.03.2022

“Meta Summit 2022”, Kariyer ve Gelişim Kulübü ile Ekonomi ve Finans Kulübü orta“Meta Summit 2022” was held in partnership with the Career and Development Club and the Economy and Finance Club.

“Meta Summit 2022”, Kariyer ve Gelişim Kulübü ile Ekonomi ve Finans Kulübü orta“Meta Summit 2022” was held at the Student Center on Tuesday, March 15, in partnership with the Career and Development Club and the Economy and Finance Club.

At the summit, which lasted all day with 6 different sessions, sector representatives in the fields of leadership, marketing, personal brand, e-commerce and Metaverse met with our students and other participants and shared their experiences and future perspectives on how business life is shaped in the digitalized world.
